mapper.select: SELECT aa.id AS attemptId, a.id AS assessmentId, a.title AS assessmentTitle, a.course_id AS courseId, c.title AS courseTitle, aa.score, a.total_score AS totalScore, a.pass_score AS passScore, CASE WHEN aa.passed = 1 THEN true ELSE false END AS passed FROM assessment_attempt aa JOIN assessment a ON a.id = aa.assessment_id LEFT JOIN course c ON c.id = a.course_id WHERE aa.id = #{attemptId}

SELECT #{assessmentId} AS assessmentId, COUNT(DISTINCT aa.user_id) AS participantCount, SUM(CASE WHEN aa.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS submittedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN aa.passed = 1 AND aa.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS passedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN aa.passed = 0 AND aa.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failedCount, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(CASE WHEN aa.status = 2 THEN aa.score END), 0), 2) AS averageScore, COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN aa.status = 2 THEN aa.score END), 0) AS highestScore, COALESCE(MIN(CASE WHEN aa.status = 2 THEN aa.score END), 0) AS lowestScore FROM assessment_attempt aa WHERE aa.assessment_id = #{assessmentId}

SELECT u.id AS userId, u.username, u.real_name AS realName, u.dept_id AS departmentId, d.name AS departmentName, COALESCE(attempt_agg.attempt_count, 0) AS attemptCount, attempt_agg.best_score AS bestScore, attempt_agg.latest_score AS latestScore, CASE WHEN attempt_agg.latest_passed = 1 THEN TRUE WHEN attempt_agg.latest_passed = 0 THEN FALSE ELSE NULL END AS passed, attempt_agg.latest_attempt_id AS latestAttemptId, attempt_agg2.started_at AS startedAt, attempt_agg2.submitted_at AS submittedAt, CASE WHEN COALESCE(attempt_agg.attempt_count, 0) = 0 THEN 'NOT_PARTICIPATED' WHEN attempt_agg.has_in_progress = 1 AND attempt_agg.has_submitted = 0 THEN 'IN_PROGRESS' WHEN attempt_agg.has_submitted = 1 THEN 'SUBMITTED' ELSE 'IN_PROGRESS' END AS participationStatus, CASE WHEN reminder_agg.reminded_count > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS reminded, reminder_agg.last_reminded_at AS lastRemindedAt FROM user u LEFT JOIN department d ON d.id = u.dept_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT aa.user_id, COUNT(*) AS attempt_count, MAX(aa.score) AS best_score, MAX(CASE WHEN aa.status IN (2,3) THEN aa.id END) AS latest_completed_id, MAX(aa.id) AS latest_attempt_id, MAX(CASE WHEN aa.status IN (2,3) THEN aa.score END) AS latest_score, MAX(CASE WHEN aa.status IN (2,3) THEN aa.passed END) AS latest_passed, MAX(CASE WHEN aa.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_in_progress, MAX(CASE WHEN aa.status IN (2,3) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_submitted FROM assessment_attempt aa WHERE aa.assessment_id = #{assessmentId} GROUP BY aa.user_id ) attempt_agg ON attempt_agg.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT aa2.user_id, MAX(aa2.started_at) AS started_at, MAX(aa2.submitted_at) AS submitted_at FROM assessment_attempt aa2 WHERE aa2.assessment_id = #{assessmentId} AND aa2.id = ( SELECT MAX(aa3.id) FROM assessment_attempt aa3 WHERE aa3.assessment_id = #{assessmentId} AND aa3.user_id = aa2.user_id ) GROUP BY aa2.user_id ) attempt_agg2 ON attempt_agg2.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT msg.receiver_id, COUNT(*) AS reminded_count, MAX(msg.created_at) AS last_reminded_at FROM course_student_message msg WHERE msg.assessment_id = #{assessmentId} AND msg.message_type = 'ASSESSMENT_REMINDER' AND msg.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY msg.receiver_id ) reminder_agg ON reminder_agg.receiver_id = u.id WHERE u.role_type = 1 AND u.status = 1 AND u.deleted_at IS NULL AND ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM assessment_question_course aqc JOIN assessment_question aq ON aq.id = aqc.question_id JOIN assessment a2 ON a2.category_id = #{categoryId} WHERE a2.course_id = #{courseId} AND aq.category_id = #{categoryId} AND aq.status = 1 AND aq.deleted_at IS NULL ) OR u.dept_id IN ( SELECT cd.department_id FROM course_department cd WHERE cd.course_id = #{courseId} ) )
AND attempt_agg.attempt_count IS NULL
AND attempt_agg.attempt_count IS NOT NULL AND attempt_agg.has_in_progress = 1 AND attempt_agg.has_submitted = 0
AND attempt_agg.has_submitted = 1
AND attempt_agg.attempt_count IS NOT NULL
AND (u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND u.dept_id = #{departmentId}
ORDER BY u.id ASC
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT aa.user_id) FROM assessment_attempt aa WHERE aa.assessment_id = #{assessmentId} AND aa.status = 1

SELECT DISTINCT msg.receiver_id FROM course_student_message msg WHERE msg.assessment_id = #{assessmentId} AND msg.message_type = 'ASSESSMENT_REMINDER' AND msg.deleted_at IS NULL AND DATE(msg.created_at) = CURDATE() AND msg.receiver_id IN
#{uid}
